name: YANAGI NO MAI (DANCE OF THE WILLOW)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C

You immediately create two bone weapons (one per hand). While in this stance, you can retract and extend these weapons into (and from) your body as a move action. The weapons are part of your body, and any damage dealt to them is therefor dealt to you. In addi- tion, when you are struck in melee with an unarmed attack, or with a held weapon of Small or smaller size, you can spend 4 Chakra to sprout sharp bones in retaliation, dealing 1d6+1 piercing damage to the attacker. You can do this only once per round.

When the technique ends, the bone weapons return to your body.
